title: Gold Balloons, 50 Pcs 12 Inch Metallic Gold Balloons for Birthday Decorations, Wedding Decorations, Baby Shower, Party Decorations
features: What You Get: This balloons set includes 50Pcs 12 inch metallic gold balloons and 1 gold ribbon.

Party Decorations: This gold party decorations can be widely used for various parties and special occasions. Perfect for birthday decorations, baby shower decorations, bridal shower decorations, wedding decorations, engagement party decorations.
Superior Quality: Our balloons are made of 100% natural latex, safe and non-toxic, and are thicker than ordinary balloons, not easy to crack, so they can be used safely.

Happy DIY Time: You just need to fill the balloon with a proper amount of air or helium, and then stick the balloon on the wall or door according to your own preferences, or string them together with ribbons to create any shape you want.
Warm Tip: Please do not overfill the balloon, try to avoid direct sunlight, keep away from sharp objects, and prevent excessive friction, otherwise it will burst.
description: Product Description The metallic gold is mysterious, elegant and fashionable. You can match gold with white, black or pink to create different decorations, so as to echo different party theme, such as, Wedding, Bridal Shower, Birthday, Baby Shower. Specifications Material - Durable Latex Quantity - 50 pieces Color - Metallic gold Size - 12 inch Premium Quality The gold balloons are made of high-quality latex material, durable, odor-free, and safe to use. Easy to Use You can also mix or add balloons of other colors according to your favorite party theme, such as white balloons, black balloons, confetti balloons, blue or pink balloons, etc.
